idea-plugin.name: copy-ai-reference
idea-plugin.description:
The Copy Ai Reference plugin is an IntelliJ IDEA plugin designed to facilitate copying code references (in the format @path#LstartLine-endLine) for use with AI CLI tools or assistants. It offers the following features:

  • When a user selects a file and chooses "Copy Ai Reference" from the right-click menu, the plugin copies the file's path relative to the codebase — for example: @src/main/kotlin/com/github/runtimeexcpetion/copyaireference/startup/MyProjectActivity.kt.
  • When a user selects multiple lines of code within a file and right-clicks, a context menu appears containing the "Copy Ai Reference" option; selecting this copies the reference to the clipboard in the format @path#LstartLine-endLine — for example: @src/main/kotlin/…/MyProjectActivity.kt#L10-15.
  • Shortcut: Ctrl+Alt+U (Windows/Linux) / Cmd+Option+U (macOS)

Copy Ai Reference 是一个 IntelliJ IDEA 插件，用于将代码引用以 @路径#L行号-行尾号 的格式复制到剪贴板，方便粘贴给 AI CLI 或助手使用。提供以下功能：

  • 在项目中选中文件，右键选择 "Copy Ai Reference"，插件将复制该文件相对于代码库的路径，例如：@src/main/kotlin/…/MyProjectActivity.kt
  • 在代码编辑器中选择多行代码，右键选择 "Copy Ai Reference"，插件会将选中代码的引用复制到剪贴板，格式为 @路径#L行号-行尾号，例如：@src/main/kotlin/…/MyProjectActivity.kt#L10-15
  • 快捷键：Ctrl+Alt+U (Windows/Linux) / Cmd+Option+U (macOS)

action.description: Copy relative path to AI reference format
Copy relative path and line numbers to AI reference format
